title: FAA Milestone and 2026 Launch Optimism
text: Archer Aviation stock surged following major FAA milestone achieving Phase 3 close of FAA 4-phase type certification process, first eVTOL company to do so. Stock soared 13% on major FAA milestone and 2026 launch optimism. Company demonstrated significant regulatory progress positioning it ahead in urban air mobility race. Key milestones achieved: completed Phase 3 of FAA certification, secured 100% Means of Compliance acceptance, established commercial operations framework. 2026 launch optimism driven by confirmed participation in White House eVTOL Integration Pilot Program across multiple states including New York, Florida, Texas. Infrastructure development advanced with Hawthorne Airport acquisition and expanded flight testing operations. CEO Adam Goldstein expressing confidence in execution from position of strength. Stock momentum reflecting investor enthusiasm about near-term regulatory pathway and revenue generation potential.
